subtitles.original: 世界
subtitles.english: ...world

subtitles.original: Darling Darling Darling...
subtitles.english: Darling, Darling, Darling...

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It's time to show the answer to you, who knows not the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先へ
subtitles.english: To the end of the spiral leading to fantasy...

subtitles.original: 言い訳に聞こえた理由は
subtitles.english: The reason it sounded like an excuse is

subtitles.original: 儚い未来 手繰った弱さ
subtitles.english: the weakness of reaching for a fleeting future.

subtitles.original: それを強さとはき違えている
subtitles.english: You are mistaking that for strength.

subtitles.original: 憎い 憎い 醜い 醜い
subtitles.english: I hate you, how ugly,

subtitles.original: 月を隠すほどの
subtitles.english: enough to obscure the moon...

subtitles.original: 黒く 黒く 淀む 心
subtitles.english: a dark, stagnant heart.

subtitles.original: 君さえ居なければ
subtitles.english: If only you weren't here.

subtitles.original: ゆらいでる ゆらいでる
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying,

subtitles.original: 花のように意志を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: connecting our wills like a flower.

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく
subtitles.english: Taking away, taking away,

subtitles.original: 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: rending the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It's time to show the answer to you, who knows not the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先に
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral leading to fantasy...

subtitles.original: 待つのは誰
subtitles.english: Who is it that waits?

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた運命を飲んだ
subtitles.english: Accepting the fate I was born with,

subtitles.original: 背負った数の名前を覚えた
subtitles.english: I remembered the names of those I carry.

subtitles.original: 爛れるほど 心燃やす感情
subtitles.english: An emotion that burns the heart to the point of blistering.

subtitles.original: 憎い 憎い 醜い 醜い
subtitles.english: I hate you, how ugly,

subtitles.original: 世界を分かつほどの
subtitles.english: enough to divide the world...

subtitles.original: 怒り 怒り 燃やす 心
subtitles.english: a heart burning with anger.

subtitles.original: 君さえ居なければ
subtitles.english: If only you weren't here.

subtitles.original: ゆらいでる ゆらいでる
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying,

subtitles.original: 花のように意志を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: connecting our wills like a flower.

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく
subtitles.english: Taking away, taking away,

subtitles.original: 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: rending the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It's time to show the answer to you, who knows not the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先へ
subtitles.english: To the end of the spiral leading to fantasy...

subtitles.original: 鬼哭に耳を傾けた仕舞よ
subtitles.english: I ended up listening to the wailing of spirits.

subtitles.original: この身に宿る万物で終いよ
subtitles.english: It ends with everything dwelling within this body.

subtitles.original: 夢幻を他者に託した弱き人
subtitles.english: The weak who entrusted their fantasy to others,

subtitles.original: きっと
subtitles.english: Surely...

subtitles.original: 命の輝きは幾星霜に
subtitles.english: The brilliance of life over countless years,

subtitles.original: 祈りの瞬きが照らす夕陽に
subtitles.english: illuminated by the blinking of prayers in the setting sun,

subtitles.original: 千夜を身に宿し
subtitles.english: harboring a thousand nights within,

subtitles.original: 解を押し付ける
subtitles.english: imposing the solution.

subtitles.original: 枯らしていく 枯らしていく
subtitles.english: Withering away, withering away,

subtitles.original: 夢幻の夜に花を裂く
subtitles.english: rending flowers in the night of fantasy.

subtitles.original: 繋いでいく 繋いでいく
subtitles.english: Connecting, connecting,

subtitles.original: 嵐に種を撒いていく
subtitles.english: sowing seeds into the storm.

subtitles.original: ゆらいでる ゆらいでる
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying,

subtitles.original: 花のように意志を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: connecting our wills like a flower.

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく
subtitles.english: Taking away, taking away,

subtitles.original: 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: rending the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It's time to show the answer to you, who knows not the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先に
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral leading to fantasy...

subtitles.original: 待つのは誰
subtitles.english: Who is it that waits?

subtitles.original: お疲れ様！
subtitles.english: Good job!

subtitles.original: ということでね、にこに、来ていただきました！
subtitles.english: And so, we have Niko joining us today!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとうございます！にこたんです！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday! It's Nikotan!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: よく、お歌い切れたな
subtitles.english: We really managed to sing it all the way!

subtitles.original: なんかもうね、顔が... 顔はもう、涙...
subtitles.english: I mean, my face... my face is already covered in...

subtitles.original: 涙で滲んでいる
subtitles.english: ...blurry tears.

responses.thoughts:
**Analysis and Execution: A Deep Dive into Synchronized Subtitle Generation**

Alright, let's break this down. My objective is crystal clear: I need to generate synchronized subtitles for this video segment, with the transcriptions in Japanese and accurate English translations. Timing is paramount; the subtitles must precisely align with the vocal activity, and I should exclude silent gaps unless visual cues are present. Also, adhere to the timecode formatting rules.

First, I examined the video frame by frame. From 00:00 to 00:09, I identified the singing of "世界 (Sekai)" and "Darling...". The initial thought was to identify each sung line. The period from 00:09 to 00:29 is purely instrumental, so I marked it as a "no subtitle" zone. Then, around 00:29, Niko begins singing the intro to "夢幻 (Mugen)". I took extra care listening and transcribing these Japanese lyrics: "永遠の意味知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ" (Eien no imi shiranu kimi ni kotae o shimesu toki da) and "夢幻に続く螺旋の先へ" (Mugen ni tsuzuku rasen no saki e). From 00:43 to 00:59, we are back in instrumental territory.

From 00:59 to 01:13, Lui's vocals started, with lyrics like "言い訳に聞こえた理由は" (Iiwake ni kikoeta riyuu wa), "儚い未来 手繰った弱さ" (Hakanai mirai tagutta yowasa), and "それを強さとはき違えている" (Sore o tsuyosa to hakichigaete iru). Next, from 01:13 to 01:27, both Niko and Lui sing together. I noted the synchronized lines "憎い 憎い 醜い 醜い" (Nikui nikui mikui mikui), "月を隠すほどの" (Tsuki o kakusu hodo no), "黒く 黒く 淀む 心" (Kuroku kuroku yodomu kokoro), and "君さえ居なければ" (Kimi sae inakereba). I went back and forth to accurately determine which singer was singing which part. From 01:27 to 01:41, the vocals of Lui and Niko alternate and combine for "ゆらいでる ゆらいでる" (Yuraideru yuraideru), "花のように意志を繋ぐ" (Hana no you ni ishi o tsunagu), "奪っていく 奪っていく" (Ubatte iku ubatte iku), and "嵐のように心を裂く" (Arashi no you ni kokoro o saku).

The lyrics then cycle back to the beginning of the song. The exact timings and content of these lyrics had to be correct. From 01:41 to 01:59, they repeat lyrics that have already been examined. From 01:59 to 02:12, Niko sings with lyrics "生まれ落ちた運命を飲んだ" (Umareochita unmei o nonda), "背負った数の名前を覚えた" (Seotta kazu no namae o oboeta), and "爛れるほど 心燃やす感情" (Tadateru hodo kokoro moyasu kanjou). From 02:13 to 02:27, both sing the second verse, a repeat with different lyrics: "憎い 憎い 醜い 醜い" (Nikui nikui mikui mikui), "世界を分かつほどの" (Sekai o wakatsu hodo no), "怒り 怒り 燃やす 心" (Ikari ikari moyasu kokoro), and "君さえ居なければ" (Kimi sae inakereba). I found that these lyrics were identical in the last verse but in reverse: "ゆらいでる ゆらいでる" (Yuraideru yuraideru), "花のように意志を繋ぐ" (Hana no you ni ishi o tsunagu), "奪っていく 奪っていく" (Ubatte iku ubatte iku), and "嵐のように心を裂く" (Arashi no you ni kokoro o saku).

From 02:41 to 02:55, it then has a repeat of the lyrics in the first verse. From 02:55 to 03:10, Lui sings lyrics such as "鬼哭に耳を傾けた仕舞よ" (Kikoku ni mimi o katamuketa shimai yo
